proof_requirements: Router-versus-best-adapter proof must be regenerated on the current git HEAD and declare the same subject_head across all proof artifacts.
Proof must compare against the audited best static adapter control and may not rest on router shadow consistency alone.
Any non-earned superiority outcome must keep the static baseline canonical and keep learned-router cutover and lobe promotion blocked.
Any earned superiority outcome must still preserve no-regression, fallback behavior, and bounded signal classes.
pass_criteria: Router ordered proof artifacts pass on the current head.
Router-versus-best-adapter outcome is stated honestly as either an earned superiority result or an explicit static hold.
Learned-router cutover and lobe promotion remain blocked unless superiority is actually earned on the same head.
Externality, comparative claims, and commercial activation remain blocked by order.
not_authorized: Learned router authorization in R5 without earned proof
